name: research-survey
description: Build rigorous, problem-driven research surveys and turn evidence into candidate research ideas through reusable research workspace workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Build problem-driven surveys and research ideas
interface.longDescription: Map a research direction from concrete problems and challenges to method families, evidence-backed gaps, candidate ideas, and next actions.
defaultPrompt: 调研这个具体研究方向并识别关键问题
比较方法族、技术挑战和证据支持
基于调研结果提出候选研究想法
